<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0,maximum-scale=1.0">
<meta name="description" content="Fear of the Lost World — Part One by Rahul Dev. Dark fantasy. Available on Amazon, Flipkart and Pothi.">
<meta property="og:title" content="Fear of the Lost World — Part One | Rahul Dev">
<meta property="og:description" content="Noe vanished between one second and the next. No struggle. No trace. No goodbye. A dark fantasy saga by Rahul Dev. Available on Amazon India, Flipkart and Pothi.">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://rahuldev.in/cover.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://rahuldev.in">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:site_name" content="Fear of the Lost World — Rahul Dev">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="Fear of the Lost World — Part One | Rahul Dev">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Noe vanished between one second and the next. A dark fantasy saga. Available on Amazon India ₹349.">
<meta name="twitter:image" content="https://rahuldev.in/cover.jpg">
<title>Fear of the Lost World — Rahul Dev</title>
<!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-YNNX5CBZM2"></script>
<script>
  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     GA4 — FEAR OF THE LOST WORLD TRACKING
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */

  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());

  /* ── Returning visitor detection ── */
  var _isReturning = false;
  try {
    _isReturning = !!localStorage.getItem('fotlw_visited');
    localStorage.setItem('fotlw_visited', '1');
  } catch(e){}

  gtag('config', 'G-YNNX5CBZM2', {
    user_properties: { visitor_type: _isReturning ? 'returning' : 'new' }
  });

  /* ── UTM capture (saved across page) ── */
  (function(){
    var p = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    var fields = ['utm_source','utm_medium','utm_campaign','utm_term','utm_content'];
    var utmData = {};
    fields.forEach(function(k){ if(p.get(k)) utmData[k] = p.get(k); });
    if(Object.keys(utmData).length){
      try{ localStorage.setItem('fotlw_utm', JSON.stringify(utmData)); }catch(e){}
      gtag('event','utm_captured', utmData);
    }
  })();

  /* ── Time on page ── */
  var _pageStart = Date.now();
  window.addEventListener('beforeunload', function(){
    var seconds = Math.round((Date.now() - _pageStart) / 1000);
    gtag('event', 'time_on_page', {
      event_category: 'Engagement',
      event_label: _isReturning ? 'returning_visitor' : 'new_visitor',
      value: seconds
    });
  });

  /* ── Scroll depth ── */
  (function(){
    var fired = {};
    var thresholds = [25, 50, 75, 90, 100];
    function getPct(){
      var el = document.documentElement;
      var total = el.scrollHeight - el.clientHeight;
      return total > 0 ? Math.round((window.pageYOffset / total) * 100) : 0;
    }
    window.addEventListener('scroll', function(){
      var pct = getPct();
      thresholds.forEach(function(t){
        if(pct >= t && !fired[t]){
          fired[t] = true;
          gtag('event', 'scroll_depth', {
            event_category: 'Engagement',
            event_label: t + '%',
            value: t
          });
        }
      });
    }, {passive: true});
  })();

  /* ── Section view time tracking ── */
  /* Fires when user enters a section + how long they stayed when they leave */
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){

    var sections = [
      { id: 'hero',       label: 'Hero'         },
      { id: 'story',      label: 'Story'        },
      { id: 'characters', label: 'Characters'   },
      { id: 'excerpt',    label: 'Excerpt'      },
      { id: 'reviews',    label: 'Reviews'      },
      { id: 'buy',        label: 'Buy Section'  }
    ];

    var sectionTimers = {};

    var sectionObserver = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
      entries.forEach(function(entry){
        var label = entry.target.dataset.trackLabel;
        if(!label) return;

        if(entry.isIntersecting){
          /* Section entered */
          sectionTimers[label] = Date.now();
          gtag('event', 'section_view', {
            event_category: 'Section Engagement',
            event_label: label
          });
        } else if(sectionTimers[label]){
          /* Section left — fire time spent */
          var spent = Math.round((Date.now() - sectionTimers[label]) / 1000);
          if(spent >= 2){ /* ignore flash-bys under 2s */
            gtag('event', 'section_time', {
              event_category: 'Section Engagement',
              event_label: label,
              value: spent
            });
          }
          delete sectionTimers[label];
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.4 });

    sections.forEach(function(s){
      var el = document.getElementById(s.id);
      if(el){
        el.dataset.trackLabel = s.label;
        sectionObserver.observe(el);
      }
    });

    /* ── Buy button clicks — which store ── */
    var buttons = [
      { selector: 'a[href*="amazon.in/dp/9357732063"]',  label: 'Amazon_Paperback' },
      { selector: 'a[href*="flipkart.com"]',             label: 'Flipkart'         },
      { selector: 'a[href*="amazon.in/dp/B0G8LWF8SY"]', label: 'Amazon_Kindle'    },
      { selector: 'a[href*="pothi.com"]',                label: 'Pothi'            }
    ];

    buttons.forEach(function(b){
      document.querySelectorAll(b.selector).forEach(function(el){
        el.addEventListener('click', function(){
          gtag('event', 'buy_button_click', {
            event_category: 'Purchase Intent',
            event_label: b.label,
            visitor_type: _isReturning ? 'returning' : 'new',
            value: 1
          });
        });
      });
    });

    /* ── Nav "Get the Book" button ── */
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-btn').forEach(function(el){
      el.addEventListener('click', function(){
        gtag('event', 'nav_cta_click', {
          event_category: 'Navigation',
          event_label: 'Get the Book — Nav'
        });
      });
    });

    /* ── Final CTA button ── */
    document.querySelectorAll('.final .btn-primary').forEach(function(el){
      el.addEventListener('click', function(){
        gtag('event', 'final_cta_click', {
          event_category: 'Purchase Intent',
          event_label: 'Final CTA — Get the Book Now'
        });
      });
    });

    /* ── Returning visitor event ── */
    if(_isReturning){
      gtag('event', 'returning_visitor', {
        event_category: 'Audience',
        event_label: 'Came back to the page'
      });
    }

  });
</script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700;900&family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;1,400;1,500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --gold:#C9A84C;--gold2:#E8C96A;--gold3:rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
  --dark:#060810;--dark2:#0d1020;--dark3:#131830;
  --cream:#F0EAD6;--muted:#6A7090;--red:#8B1A1A;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--dark);color:var(--cream);font-family:'EB Garamond',Georgia,serif;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:200;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:14px 24px;background:rgba(6,8,16,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12)}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.3em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase}
.nav-right{display:flex;gap:20px;align-items:center}
.nav-link{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;display:none}
@media(min-width:500px){.nav-link{display:block}}
.nav-btn{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dark);background:var(--gold);border:none;padding:9px 20px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero{position:relative;height:100vh;min-height:600px;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;padding-bottom:20px}
.hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center top;z-index:0}
.hero-layer1{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(6,8,16,0.3) 0%,rgba(6,8,16,0.1) 30%,rgba(6,8,16,0.5) 70%,rgba(6,8,16,1) 100%);z-index:1}
.hero-layer2{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 100% 80% at 50% 50%,transparent 30%,rgba(6,8,16,0.6) 100%);z-index:1}
.hero-content{position:relative;z-index:2;padding:0 24px;max-width:700px}
.hero-eyebrow{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.55em;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.7);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px;animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.1s both}
.hero-cresc{font-size:22px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:0.5em;margin-bottom:14px;animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.15s both}
.hero-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(2.8rem,12vw,5.5rem);color:#fff;line-height:0.95;letter-spacing:0.02em;text-transform:uppercase;animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.2s both;text-shadow:0 4px 40px rgba(201,168,76,0.2)}
.hero-title span{display:block;color:var(--gold);font-size:0.6em;letter-spacing:0.15em;margin-top:8px}
.hero-divider{width:80px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);margin:22px auto;animation:fadeIn 1.2s ease 0.4s both}
.hero-tagline{font-size:clamp(1.1rem,4vw,1.4rem);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);font-style:italic;line-height:1.6;max-width:520px;margin:0 auto;animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.5s both}
.hero-tagline strong{color:#fff;font-style:normal;font-weight:500}
.hero-sub{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.6);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:14px;animation:fadeIn 1s ease 0.65s both}
.hero-btns{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;align-items:center;margin-top:30px;animation:fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.8s both}
.btn-primary{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:0.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dark);background:var(--gold);border:none;padding:15px 32px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;width:min(260px,90vw);transition:all 0.2s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;text-align:center}
.btn-primary:hover{background:var(--gold2);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-secondary{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:0.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.5);padding:14px 32px;cursor:pointer;width:min(260px,90vw);transition:all 0.2s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap}
.btn-secondary:hover{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,0.08);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.hero-stores{display:flex;gap:18px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:26px;animation:fadeIn 1.2s ease 1s both}
.store-badge{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px}
.store-name{font-size:12px;color:rgba(240,234,214,0.8);font-style:italic}

/* ── SCROLL INDICATOR ── */
.scroll-hint{position:absolute;bottom:30px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:2;animation:bounce 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.scroll-hint span{display:block;width:1px;height:40px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,var(--gold));margin:0 auto}
@keyframes bounce{0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(8px)}}

/* ── OPENING HOOK ── */
.hook{padding:80px 24px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.hook::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(201,168,76,0.3),transparent)}
.hook-label{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.5em;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.5);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:20px}
.hook-big{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,5.5vw,2.6rem);color:#fff;font-weight:700;line-height:1.25;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto 20px}
.hook-big em{color:var(--gold);font-style:normal}
.hook-body{font-size:clamp(1rem,3vw,1.15rem);color:#9090a8;font-style:italic;max-width:560px;margin:0 auto;line-height:1.9}

/* ── FULL WIDTH SCENES ── */
.fw-scene{position:relative;overflow:hidden;margin:0}
.fw-scene img{width:100%;display:block;filter:brightness(0.72) saturate(0.8)}
.fw-scene-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(6,8,16,1) 0%,rgba(6,8,16,0.15) 35%,rgba(6,8,16,0.15) 65%,rgba(6,8,16,0.6) 100%)}
.fw-scene-text{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:clamp(20px,4vw,44px);text-align:center}
.fw-quote{font-style:italic;font-size:clamp(1rem,3vw,1.2rem);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);line-height:1.8;max-width:580px;margin:0 auto 10px}
.fw-attr{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.55);text-transform:uppercase}

/* ── STORY SECTION ── */
.story-sec{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:0;max-width:100%;overflow:hidden}
@media(min-width:680px){.story-sec{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
.story-img{position:relative;overflow:hidden;min-height:420px}
.story-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;filter:brightness(0.75) saturate(0.8)}
.story-img-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent 60%,var(--dark) 100%)}
@media(max-width:679px){.story-img-overlay{background:linear-gradient(0deg,var(--dark) 0%,transparent 40%)}}
.story-text{background:var(--dark2);padding:clamp(36px,5vw,60px) clamp(24px,4vw,50px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.sec-eyebrow{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.45em;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.5);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px}
.sec-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,4vw,2.2rem);color:#fff;font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:18px}
.sec-body{font-size:clamp(0.95rem,2.5vw,1.05rem);color:#9090a8;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:14px}
.sec-body p{margin-bottom:12px}
.gold-rule{width:50px;height:2px;background:var(--gold);margin:20px 0}

/* ── EXCERPT ── */
.excerpt{padding:clamp(40px,6vw,80px) 24px;background:var(--dark2);position:relative}
.excerpt::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent)}
.excerpt-inner{max-width:700px;margin:0 auto}
.excerpt-label{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.45em;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.5);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px}
.excerpt-ch{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:24px;font-weight:600}
.excerpt-text{font-style:italic;font-size:clamp(1rem,3vw,1.12rem);color:#c0bcb0;line-height:2.1;border-left:2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);padding-left:22px}
.excerpt-text em{color:#fff;font-style:normal;font-weight:500}
.excerpt-fade{height:80px;background:linear-gradient(0deg,var(--dark2),transparent);margin-top:-80px;position:relative}
.excerpt-cta{text-align:center;padding:20px 0 0;font-size:15px;color:var(--muted);font-style:italic}
.excerpt-cta a{color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:0.15em}

/* ── VILLAIN ── */
.villain{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:var(--dark)}
.villain-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;}
@media(min-width:680px){.villain-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
.villain-img{position:relative;min-height:500px;overflow:hidden}
.villain-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;filter:brightness(0.8) saturate(0.7) contrast(1.1)}
.villain-img-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(270deg,var(--dark) 0%,transparent 60%)}
@media(max-width:679px){.villain-img-overlay{background:linear-gradient(0deg,var(--dark) 0%,transparent 50%)}}
.villain-text{background:var(--dark);padding:clamp(40px,6vw,80px) clamp(24px,4vw,50px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.villain-eyebrow{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.5em;color:rgba(139,26,26,0.8);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px}
.villain-name{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(3rem,10vw,5.5rem);color:#fff;font-weight:900;line-height:0.9;margin-bottom:28px;letter-spacing:0.04em}
.villain-name span{display:block;font-size:0.28em;letter-spacing:0.4em;color:rgba(139,26,26,0.7);font-weight:400;margin-bottom:6px}
.villain-lines{margin-bottom:24px}
.villain-line{font-style:italic;font-size:clamp(0.95rem,2.5vw,1.05rem);color:#8888a0;line-height:2;padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)}
.villain-line strong{color:#c8c4b8;font-style:normal}
.villain-line:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.villain-reveal{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(0.9rem,2.5vw,1rem);color:rgba(201,168,76,0.85);letter-spacing:0.05em;font-weight:600;margin-top:20px;padding:14px 18px;border:1px solid rgba(139,26,26,0.3);background:rgba(139,26,26,0.07)}

/* ── LULLABY ── */
.lullaby{padding:clamp(50px,8vw,90px) 24px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.lullaby-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center;filter:brightness(0.12) saturate(0.5);z-index:0}
.lullaby-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(6,8,16,0.75);z-index:1}
.lullaby-content{position:relative;z-index:2}
.lullaby-cresc{font-size:18px;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.4);letter-spacing:0.4em;margin-bottom:24px}
.lullaby-text{font-style:italic;font-size:clamp(1.1rem,4vw,1.4rem);color:rgba(180,176,200,0.9);line-height:2.5;max-width:420px;margin:0 auto 18px}
.lullaby-credit{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.4);text-transform:uppercase}

/* ── QUOTES ── */
.quotes{padding:clamp(40px,6vw,80px) 24px;max-width:800px;margin:0 auto}
.quotes-label{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.45em;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.5);text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;margin-bottom:40px}
.quote-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:20px;margin-bottom:20px}
@media(min-width:600px){.quote-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
.q-card{padding:24px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1);background:rgba(13,16,32,0.8);position:relative}
.q-card::before{content:'"';font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:60px;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.08);position:absolute;top:-10px;left:14px;line-height:1}
.q-text{font-style:italic;font-size:clamp(0.95rem,2.5vw,1.05rem);color:#b0acbe;line-height:1.85;margin-bottom:10px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.q-text strong{color:#fff;font-style:normal}
.q-attr{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.18em;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.45);text-transform:uppercase}

/* ── LOCKET ── */
.locket-sec{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.locket-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center;filter:brightness(0.15) saturate(0.5)}
.locket-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(6,8,16,0.8)}
.locket-inner{position:relative;z-index:2;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:0;align-items:center;max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;padding:clamp(40px,6vw,80px) 24px}
@media(min-width:600px){.locket-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:40px}}
.locket-img-wrap img{width:100%;max-width:380px;display:block;margin:0 auto}
.locket-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(1.3rem,4vw,1.8rem);color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:14px;font-weight:600}
.locket-body{font-size:clamp(0.95rem,2.5vw,1.05rem);color:#9090a8;line-height:1.9}
.locket-body em{color:#c8c4b8;font-style:italic}

/* ── CHARACTERS ── */
.chars{padding:clamp(40px,6vw,80px) 0;background:var(--dark)}
.chars-header{text-align:center;padding:0 24px;margin-bottom:clamp(30px,4vw,50px)}
.chars-strip{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:0}
@media(min-width:700px){.chars-strip{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}}
.char{position:relative;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:3/4}
.char img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;filter:brightness(0.7) saturate(0.75);transition:all 0.5s ease}
.char:hover img{filter:brightness(0.95) saturate(1);transform:scale(1.04)}
.char-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(6,8,16,0.98) 0%,rgba(6,8,16,0.4) 50%,transparent 80%);transition:background 0.4s}
.char:hover .char-overlay{background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(6,8,16,0.98) 0%,rgba(6,8,16,0.6) 60%,transparent 100%)}
.char-info{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:18px 16px}
.char-name{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(14px,3vw,18px);color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.08em;display:block;margin-bottom:4px}
.char-role{font-size:clamp(10px,2vw,12px);color:#7070a0;font-style:italic;display:block;margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.3}
.char-quote{font-size:clamp(10px,2vw,12px);color:#c8c4b8;font-style:italic;line-height:1.4;display:none}
@media(min-width:400px){.char-quote{display:block}}

/* ── ENSEMBLE SCENE ── */
.ensemble{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.ensemble img{width:100%;display:block;filter:brightness(0.72) saturate(0.78)}
.ensemble-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(6,8,16,1) 0%,transparent 30%,transparent 70%,rgba(6,8,16,0.7) 100%)}
.ensemble-bottom{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;text-align:center;padding:clamp(16px,3vw,30px)}
.ensemble-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(0.8rem,3vw,1rem);color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:0.25em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px}
.ensemble-names{font-size:13px;color:#6a7090;font-style:italic}

/* ── MAP ── */
.map-sec{padding:clamp(50px,6vw,80px) 24px;text-align:center;background:var(--dark2)}
.map-sec img{max-width:min(400px,85vw);margin:24px auto 0;display:block;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2)}

/* ── FEATURES ── */
.features{padding:clamp(50px,6vw,80px) 24px;max-width:780px;margin:0 auto}
.feat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-top:30px}
@media(min-width:600px){.feat-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
.feat{padding:20px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1);background:rgba(13,16,32,0.6);transition:border-color 0.3s}
.feat:hover{border-color:rgba(201,168,76,0.35)}
.feat-num{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1.8rem;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.15);font-weight:700;line-height:1;margin-bottom:10px}
.feat-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:600}
.feat-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.65}

/* ── SERIES ── */
.series{padding:clamp(50px,6vw,80px) 24px;max-width:780px;margin:0 auto}
.series-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:28px}
.s-item{padding:18px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1);position:relative;background:rgba(13,16,32,0.6)}
.s-item.active{border-color:rgba(201,168,76,0.5);background:rgba(201,168,76,0.06)}
.s-badge{position:absolute;top:-9px;left:12px;background:var(--gold);color:var(--dark);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.1em;padding:2px 9px;font-weight:700}
.s-num{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.5);letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px}
.s-name{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(0.9rem,3vw,1.1rem);color:#c8c4b8;margin-bottom:6px}
.s-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.55}

/* ── SIMUS SCENE ── */
.simus-sec{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.simus-sec img{width:100%;display:block;filter:brightness(0.65) saturate(0.75)}
.simus-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(6,8,16,1) 0%,transparent 35%,transparent 65%,rgba(6,8,16,0.8) 100%)}
.simus-text{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:clamp(20px,4vw,44px);text-align:center}

/* ── EMAIL ── */
.email-sec{padding:clamp(50px,6vw,80px) 24px;text-align:center;background:var(--dark2);border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.08)}
.email-bonus{display:inline-block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dark);background:var(--gold);padding:4px 14px;margin-bottom:18px;font-weight:700}
.email-intro{font-size:clamp(0.95rem,2.5vw,1.05rem);color:var(--muted);margin:10px auto 24px;max-width:400px;line-height:1.75}
.email-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;max-width:400px;margin:0 auto}
.email-in{width:100%;padding:14px 18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.28);color:var(--cream);font-family:'EB Garamond',serif;font-size:16px;outline:none;transition:border-color 0.2s}
.email-in:focus{border-color:var(--gold)}
.email-in::placeholder{color:var(--muted)}
.email-note{font-size:12px;color:rgba(138,143,168,0.4);margin-top:8px}

/* ── BUY ── */
.buy-sec{padding:clamp(50px,6vw,80px) 24px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.buy-sec-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center;filter:brightness(0.08) saturate(0.4)}
.buy-sec-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(6,8,16,0.92)}
.buy-inner{position:relative;z-index:2}
.buy-price{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,7vw,3rem);color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;margin:14px 0 4px}
.buy-note{font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:28px}
.buy-grid{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px}
@media(min-width:460px){.buy-grid{flex-direction:row;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}}
.buy-btn{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:16px 24px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.4);color:var(--cream);background:rgba(201,168,76,0.05);transition:all 0.2s;width:min(210px,88vw);text-decoration:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.buy-btn:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,0.14);border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.buy-btn.primary{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,0.1)}
.buy-platform{font-size:15px;color:#fff}
.buy-price-tag{font-size:11px;color:var(--gold)}
.buy-divider{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;max-width:400px;margin:24px auto;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.25);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.3em;text-transform:uppercase}
.buy-divider::before,.buy-divider::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.15)}
.ebook-grid{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;align-items:center}
@media(min-width:460px){.ebook-grid{flex-direction:row;justify-content:center}}
.ebook-btn{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:14px 24px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.18);color:var(--cream);background:transparent;transition:all 0.2s;width:min(210px,88vw);text-decoration:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.ebook-btn:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,0.08);border-color:rgba(201,168,76,0.4)}
.ebook-btn.soon{opacity:0.4;pointer-events:none}
.buy-guarantee{font-size:12px;color:rgba(106,112,144,0.5);margin-top:20px;font-style:italic}

/* ── FINAL CTA ── */
.final{padding:clamp(60px,8vw,100px) 24px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.final-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center;filter:brightness(0.1) saturate(0.4)}
.final-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(6,8,16,0.88)}
.final-inner{position:relative;z-index:2}
.final-quote{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(1.1rem,4vw,1.7rem);color:#fff;line-height:1.5;max-width:560px;margin:0 auto 18px;font-weight:600}
.final-sub{font-size:15px;color:var(--muted);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:30px}

/* ── REVIEW SECTION ── */
.review-sec{{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--dark) 0%,var(--dark2) 50%,var(--dark) 100%);padding:clamp(50px,6vw,80px) 24px;border-top:2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);border-bottom:2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);position:relative}}
.review-sec::before{{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent)}}
.review-inner{{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center}}
.review-grid{{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:16px;margin-top:28px;text-align:left}}
@media(min-width:600px){{.review-grid{{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}}}
.review-card{{padding:24px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);background:rgba(13,16,32,0.8)}}
.review-card.featured{{border-color:rgba(201,168,76,0.5);background:rgba(201,168,76,0.07);box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(201,168,76,0.06)}}
.review-stars{{color:var(--gold);font-size:22px;letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:12px;text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(201,168,76,0.4)}}
.review-title{{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(14px,3vw,17px);color:#fff;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1.4}}
.review-text{{font-size:14px;color:#9090a8;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;font-style:italic}}
.review-meta{{border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1);padding-top:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px}}
.review-name{{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:12px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:0.1em;font-weight:600}}
.review-verified{{font-size:11px;color:#4a9a4a}}
.review-date{{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}}
.review-cta-text{{font-size:15px;color:var(--muted);font-style:italic;margin:14px 0 18px;line-height:1.6}}
.review-link{display:block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.15em;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.85);text-decoration:none;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;transition:all 0.2s;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);padding:12px 20px;text-align:center}}
.review-link:hover{color:#fff;border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,0.08)}}
.cta-card{{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;text-align:center}}

/* ── AUTHOR SECTION ── */
.author-sec-wrap{{padding:clamp(50px,6vw,80px) 24px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--dark2) 0%,var(--dark) 100%);border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.08)}}
.author-inner{{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:32px;align-items:center}}
@media(min-width:580px){{.author-inner{{grid-template-columns:200px 1fr;gap:44px}}}}
.author-img-wrap{{flex-shrink:0}}
.author-img-wrap img{{width:min(220px,65vw);border-radius:0;display:block;margin:0 auto;border:none;filter:brightness(0.75) saturate(0.6) contrast(1.05);mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 85% 90% at 50% 40%,black 40%,transparent 100%);-webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 85% 90% at 50% 40%,black 40%,transparent 100%)}}
.author-name-big{{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(1.4rem,4vw,2rem);color:#fff;font-weight:700;margin:8px 0 10px}}
.author-tags{{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap}}
.author-tag{{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase}}
.author-tag-dot{{color:rgba(201,168,76,0.3);font-size:16px}}
.author-bio-text{{font-size:clamp(14px,2.5vw,16px);color:#9090a8;line-height:1.85;margin-bottom:12px}}
.author-bio-text em{{color:#c8c4b8}}
.author-quote{{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.7);font-style:italic;margin-top:14px;padding-left:14px;border-left:2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3)}}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{text-align:center;padding:36px 24px;border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.07);color:rgba(106,112,144,0.4);font-size:13px}
.foot-cresc{font-size:16px;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.3);display:block;margin-bottom:10px;letter-spacing:0.35em}

/* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);transition:opacity 0.7s ease,transform 0.7s ease}
.rv.on{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.rv2{opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.9s ease}
.rv2.on{opacity:1}
.char img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;filter:brightness(0.7) saturate(0.75);transition:all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94);transform-origin:center center}
.char:hover img,.char.active img{filter:brightness(1) saturate(1.1);transform:scale(1.1)}
.char-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(6,8,16,0.98) 0%,rgba(6,8,16,0.4) 50%,transparent 80%);transition:all 0.5s ease}
.char:hover .char-overlay,.char.active .char-overlay{background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(6,8,16,0.95) 0%,rgba(6,8,16,0.3) 50%,transparent 100%)}
.char{cursor:pointer;overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.char:hover,.char.active{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(201,168,76,0.5)}
.char-info{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:22px 18px;transition:all 0.4s ease;transform:translateY(0)}
.char:hover .char-info,.char.active .char-info{transform:translateY(-10px)}
/* ── FLASH OFFER BANNER ── */
.flash-banner{position:absolute;top:80px;left:0;right:0;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;z-index:10;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap}
.flash-banner-inner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(139,26,26,0.95),rgba(180,40,40,0.95));border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.8);padding:10px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(139,26,26,0.5);animation:flashPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.flash-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#ff4444;animation:flashDot 1s ease-in-out infinite;flex-shrink:0}
.flash-text{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(10px,2.5vw,13px);color:#fff;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700}
.flash-text em{color:#E8C96A;font-style:normal;font-size:1.1em}
@keyframes flashPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(139,26,26,0.5);transform:scale(1)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(139,26,26,0.9);transform:scale(1.03)}}
@keyframes flashDot{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.2}}
</style>

<!-- Meta Pixel Code -->
<script>
  !function(f,b,e,v,n,t,s)
  {if(f.fbq)return;n=f.fbq=function(){n.callMethod?
  n.callMethod.apply(n,arguments):n.queue.push(arguments)};
  if(!f._fbq)f._fbq=n;n.push=n;n.loaded=!0;n.version='2.0';
  n.queue=[];t=b.createElement(e);t.async=!0;
  t.src=v;s=b.getElementsByTagName(e)[0];
  s.parentNode.insertBefore(t,s)}(window, document,'script',
  'https://connect.facebook.net/en_US/fbevents.js');
  fbq('init', '2164098424417298');
  fbq('track', 'PageView');
</script>
<noscript><img height="1" width="1" style="display:none"
  src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=2164098424417298&ev=PageView&noscript=1"/>
</noscript>
<!-- End Meta Pixel Code -->

</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <span class="nav-logo">☽ &nbsp; Rahul Dev &nbsp; ☾</span>
  <div class="nav-right">
    <a class="nav-link" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="var el=document.getElementById('story');if(el)el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">Story</a>
    <a class="nav-link" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="var el=document.getElementById('characters');if(el)el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">Characters</a>
    <a class="nav-btn" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="var el=document.getElementById('buy');if(el)el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">Get Book</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- ═══ HERO ═══ -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')"></div>
  <div class="hero-layer1"></div>
  <div class="hero-layer2"></div>
  <a class="flash-banner" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="document.getElementById('ebook-section').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
    <div class="flash-banner-inner">
      <div class="flash-dot"></div>
      <div class="flash-text">🔥 Limited Offer &nbsp;·&nbsp; eBook only <em>₹99</em> &nbsp;·&nbsp; Amazon Kindle</div>
    </div>
  </a>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow rv">☽ &nbsp; A Dark Fantasy Saga &nbsp; ☾</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title rv"><span class="ht-top">Fear of the</span><span class="ht-bottom">Lost World</span></h1>
    <div class="hero-subtitle rv">— Part One &nbsp;·&nbsp; The Cracks in Time —</div>
    <div class="hero-divider rv"></div>
    <p class="hero-tagline rv"><strong>Noe vanished between one second and the next.</strong><br>No struggle. No trace. No goodbye.</p>
    <p class="hero-sub rv">by Rahul Dev</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a class="btn-primary" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="var el=document.getElementById('buy');if(el)el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">Get the Book — ₹349</a>
      <a class="btn-secondary" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="var el=document.getElementById('story');if(el)el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">Enter the World ↓</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stores rv">
      <div class="store-badge"><span class="plat-label">On</span><span class="store-name">Amazon India</span></div>
      <div class="store-badge"><span class="plat-label">On</span><span class="store-name">Flipkart</span></div>
      <div class="store-badge"><span class="plat-label">On</span><span class="store-name">Pothi.com</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint"><span></span></div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ OPENING HOOK ═══ -->
<div class="hook" id="story">
  <div class="hook-label rv">The Story</div>
  <h2 class="hook-big rv">The police closed the case.<br><em>Jenny refused to.</em></h2>
  <p class="hook-body rv">Two months of silence. A forest that should not exist. And a world hidden inside the space between the tick and the tock of a watch — waiting for someone brave enough to step inside.</p>
</div>

<!-- ═══ JENNY WAKES — full width ═══ -->
<div class="fw-scene rv2">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Jenny waking up screaming">
  <div class="fw-scene-overlay"></div>
  <div class="fw-scene-text">
    <p class="fw-quote">"NOE!!!" Her cry tore through the room, raw and desperate. She sat upright in bed, chest heaving. Everything looked normal. But Noe was gone.</p>
    <span class="fw-attr">— Chapter 2 · The Closing Case</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ STORY + COVER ═══ -->
<div class="story-sec">
  <div class="story-img rv2">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
